mergeStatePartial.signature: mergeStatePartial(cwd: string, partial: { milestones?: Array, currentMilestone?: string }): Promise<void>
mergeStatePartial.description: Merges a partial state update into existing STATE.json within a transaction, preserving version, projectName, createdAt, rapidVersion fields while updating only the specified fields

descriptionAlias.signature: case '--description': (falls through to case '--desc': in CLI switch)
descriptionAlias.description: Adds --description as an alias for --desc in src/commands/init.cjs CLI parser

preservedRecalculateDAG.description: Fixed recalculateDAG in add-set.cjs that preserves existing DAG node annotations (group, priority, description) during recalculation instead of stripping them to { id: s.id }

fileOwnershipSchema.description: Extended CONTRACT_META_SCHEMA in contract.cjs to accept optional fileOwnership field for ownership-based group splitting

execFileSync.signature: execFileSync(cmd: string, args: string[], options?: object): Buffer
execFileSync.description: Replaced execSync template string calls in worktree.cjs with execFileSync to prevent shell injection through set/branch names

requirementsPreservation.signature: scaffoldProject(cwd, options) -- skips REQUIREMENTS.md when it contains user-approved content
requirementsPreservation.description: Modified scaffoldProject() in init.cjs to not overwrite REQUIREMENTS.md if it contains encoded criteria

nodeMinimumBump.description: Updated Node.js minimum version check from 18 to 20+ in prereqs.cjs

statePreservation.description: mergeStatePartial() must preserve all existing STATE.json fields not included in the partial update, and the resulting state must pass Zod ProjectState validation

annotationPreservation.description: recalculateDAG() must carry forward all existing node properties (group, priority, description, etc.) when reconstructing nodes, not just { id: s.id }

requirementsProtection.description: scaffoldProject() must not overwrite REQUIREMENTS.md when it contains lines matching the encoded criteria pattern

noShellInjection.description: All git command execution in worktree.cjs must use execFileSync with argument arrays, never execSync with template string interpolation

definition.scope: Fix all three known bugs (REQUIREMENTS.md overwrite, --desc/--description mismatch, roadmapper STATE.json overwrite) and resolve foundational infrastructure issues: Node.js minimum bump, shell injection fix, fileOwnership in contract meta-schema, and recalculateDAG annotation preservation.

tasks.description: Add --description alias for --desc in src/commands/init.cjs CLI parser
tasks.acceptance: Both --desc and --description flags are accepted and produce identical results

tasks.description: Fix REQUIREMENTS.md overwrite by removing it from fileGenerators or adding content-check guard
tasks.acceptance: scaffoldProject() does not overwrite REQUIREMENTS.md containing encoded criteria

tasks.description: Implement mergeStatePartial() for atomic state merge and update init SKILL.md Step 9
tasks.acceptance: Roadmapper output merges into STATE.json preserving envelope fields; Zod validation passes

tasks.description: Fix recalculateDAG() in add-set.cjs to preserve existing node annotations
tasks.acceptance: DAG recalculation carries forward group, priority, description fields on existing nodes

tasks.description: Add fileOwnership to CONTRACT_META_SCHEMA as optional field
tasks.acceptance: Contracts with fileOwnership field pass Ajv validation

tasks.description: Replace execSync with execFileSync in worktree.cjs
tasks.acceptance: All git commands in worktree.cjs use execFileSync with argument arrays

tasks.description: Bump Node.js minimum version to 20+ in prereqs.cjs
tasks.acceptance: Version check rejects Node.js < 20 and accepts Node.js >= 20

acceptance: All three bugs fixed with regression tests
No execSync with template strings in worktree.cjs
